task: Advanced high-value task: Cfd Surrogate Validation Sample Failure-Mode Control Plan. Scenario: a program manager is comparing technical risk, cost, and validation burden before committing scarce expert time for cfd surrogate validation sample. Embedded packet: Records: R1 CFD_pressure_drop_kPa=52 surrogate_drop_kPa=80 porosity_pct=7; R2 CFD_pressure_drop_kPa=61 surrogate_drop_kPa=76 porosity_pct=10; R3 CFD_pressure_drop_kPa=47 surrogate_drop_kPa=91 porosity_pct=6. Remediation options: O1 changes CFD_pressure_drop_kPa by -12% cost=83000; O2 changes surrogate_drop_kPa by -18% cost=99400; O3 changes porosity_pct by -25% cost=58600; max_budget=124800. Rules and constraints: absolute percent error>15% fails; porosity<40 may be outside support; missing values cannot be imputed and all calculations must use only the embedded packet. Required work: compare the current state to a conservative target state and recommend the least risky next experiment or control change. Deliver CFD_surrogate_1.xlsx + expert_memo.md with formulas, intermediate values, row-level citations, explicit assumptions, sensitivity checks, and a final recommendation table. Do not invent inputs; mark ambiguous items as needs_review.
